text.title: Learning Speed as Competitive Moat Core Rules
text.summary: Framework treating organisational learning velocity (belief-update rate, decision throughput, evidence freshness) as the primary competitive advantage in AI-cloneable markets; outputs a quarterly belief-audit.

rule.statement: Every product strategy MUST maintain a written belief register: each belief has confidence (0-1), last_update date, and the evidence type that would change it.
rule.rationale: Implicit beliefs cannot be updated; the register turns strategy into a falsifiable artifact.

rule.statement: Track decisions/quarter and time-from-question-to-decision per category (P0/P1/P2). Time-from-question target is hours for P2, days for P1, <=2 weeks for P0.
rule.rationale: Without tracking, decision latency creeps invisibly; visibility creates the pressure to compress.

rule.statement: Beliefs older than 90 days without re-validation MUST be flagged. Strategy artefacts citing >180-day evidence MUST trigger a refresh.
rule.rationale: Stale evidence locks in dead assumptions; freshness thresholds force re-test cadence.

rule.statement: When a competitor wins a deal or ships first, log the loss with cause-of-loss tag (faster-learning / better-evidence / shipped-sooner / wrong-belief). Quarterly review aggregates.
rule.rationale: Lost deals without cause coding don't update beliefs; the next loop repeats the same loss.

rule.statement: Every active bet MUST have written kill-criteria registered at start. Hitting kill-criteria triggers automatic re-evaluation, not silent continuation.
rule.rationale: Without kill criteria, sunk-cost bias preserves dying bets and starves new ones.

rule.statement: If applicability conditions fail (any Skip-If trigger holds — pre-PMF where customer-development is primary; agency/consulting one-shot projects; commodity competition on price; pure execution sprint), the agent MUST skip this methodology and route to the named alternative or to the methodology fallback.
rule.rationale: Mis-applying a methodology outside its preconditions degrades output quality and pollutes downstream artefacts; the explicit skip-rule keeps the routing tree honest.
